_publications._publicationTitle: Comparison of 1D and 3D volume measurement techniques in NF2-associated vestibular schwannoma monitoring.

_contextSnippet: Classification systems are sufficient for categorizing tumors and assessing intra- and extrameatal extension but are not suitable for detailed monitoring of tumor volume
details: Sufficient for categorizing tumors and assessing intra- and extrameatal extension but not suitable for detailed monitoring of tumor volume
